prompt: A minimalist premium food advertisement poster featuring a single halved head of napa cabbage kimchi on one shallow off-white ceramic plate, centered in the lower half of the frame against a clean warm ivory studio background. The kimchi is large, glossy, and richly detailed, with tightly layered cabbage leaves coated in vivid deep red chili paste, visible streaks of seasoning, and a few dark green leaf accents. Use soft diffused studio lighting from the upper left, gentle realistic shadows, crisp food-photography texture, and a refined high-end Korean commercial aesthetic. Keep the composition sparse with generous negative space above the dish. At the top center, place large elegant Korean calligraphy-style text reading 김치, and directly below it in small subtle gray Korean text place 매콤 아삭의 결정판.. Vertical poster layout, ultra-clean styling, natural ceramic tones, realistic appetizing color, luxury grocery or restaurant campaign look.
